notes: Long time backer, so am able to get on Early Access to this game.  It works perfectly now out of the box on Steam (dotnet work was needed pre-Steam).  Jaw dropping visuals, high FPS, sound, MP - all perfect from the get-go.  MMO space combat, no grind, no loot boxes.  Enjoy!
title: Infinity: Battlescape

notes:
Game crashes upon loading usually, but sometimes menu music starts playing and the game freezes instead of crashing. Somehow I was able to load the game a few times and even connect to the server twice. It was about 10-15 fps near the station, but around 100 in deep space. However, both times game crashed after getting close to battle places. Since then the game always crashes at loading screen, I don't understand on which conditions the game can progress past initial loading.
None of the proton tweaks changes anything, successful attempts were without any environment variables being set. Though, I managed to load main menu once with "wined3d" option, but that's it, game crashed upon connecting to the server (also planet's lighting/color on the background was a bit wrong).
According to I:B logs the problem is with textures creation.

P.S.: Just in case, I ran the game on Windows 8, to be sure that my hardware is capable, the result was more than satisfying: 90-120 fps most of the time, drops to 40-50 in very intense situations.
title: Infinity: Battlescape

notes: Runs fine, at load screens crashes with DX11Renderer exception. Logs always mention a texture failing to compile
title: Infinity: Battlescape

notes: Didn't need to do anything to get it running, no errors on menus & can join matches.
title: Infinity: Battlescape
